SEARCH
Package com.mycompany.model

Class ConnectionNode

java.lang.Object
com.mycompany.model.CircuitElement
com.mycompany.model.ConnectionNode
public class ConnectionNode extends CircuitElement
Composite connection node representing either a series or parallel grouping of CircuitElement children. ConnectionNode composes primitive components (Resistor, Capacitor, Inductor) and other ConnectionNode instances to form a hierarchical circuit structure. The node can operate in two modes:
  • series — impedances of children are summed
  • parallel — reciprocals of impedances are summed and inverted
The children list is backed by a runtime-checked list (Collections.checkedList) to provide additional type-safety at runtime when elements are added. Typical usage: 
   ConnectionNode root = new ConnectionNode(true); // series
   root.addChild(new Resistor(100));
   root.addChild(new ConnectionNode(false)); // nested parallel group
Version:
1.2
Author:
Kamil Fulneczek

  • Constructor Details

    • ConnectionNode

      public ConnectionNode(boolean series)
      Create a connection node.
      Parameters:
      series - true for series connection, false for parallel

  • Method Details

    • addChild

      public void addChild(CircuitElement element)
      Add a child element to this connection.
      Parameters:
      element - element to add; must not be null

    • removeChild

      public boolean removeChild(CircuitElement element)
      Remove a child element from this connection.
      Parameters:
      element - element to remove
      Returns:
      true if the element was present and removed, false otherwise

    • removeChild

      public boolean removeChild(Component component)
      Convenience overload to remove a Component child.
      Parameters:
      component - component to remove
      Returns:
      true if removed, false otherwise

    • removeChild

      public boolean removeChild(ConnectionNode node)
      Convenience overload to remove a ConnectionNode child.
      Parameters:
      node - child connection node to remove
      Returns:
      true if removed, false otherwise

    • isSeries

      public boolean isSeries()
      Returns whether this node represents a series connection.
      Returns:
      true if series, false if parallel

    • getChildren

      public List<CircuitElement> getChildren()
      Return a snapshot list of child elements.
      Returns:
      list of child CircuitElement instances

    • getImpedance

      public Complex getImpedance(double frequencyHz) throws InvalidCircuitException
      Compute equivalent impedance by aggregating child impedances.
      Specified by:
      getImpedance in class CircuitElement
      Parameters:
      frequencyHz - frequency in Hz
      Returns:
      equivalent impedance as Complex
      Throws:
      InvalidCircuitException - when node has no children or a child computation fails

    • description

      public String description()
      Description copied from class: CircuitElement
      Return a short human-readable description of this element suitable for display, for example "R(100)" or "series(R(100), C(1e-6))".

      description in class CircuitElement
      Returns:
